creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
What happens if you either install drm-kmod (from ports, so that it matches your kernel, since you are running STABLE) and follow the instructions to have it load.
Other option is to try to force disable DRI3 by setting the envrionment variable LIBGL_DRI3_DISABLE to 1 before starting any OpenGL application.
See the UPDATING entry from 20200308.

Please try either of this and see if it helps.
